string 2: Merukimon, please! We can't simply withdraw like this!

We long for a place to demonstrate our strength.
No... this is the critical moment!

...Ah, you have come! I would like for you to hear the
thoughts of these two warriors.
{next}All right.
{next}Their thoughts on what?
{end}I'm too busy right now.

That would be a huge help. They mean well, but their zeal
has left me at a loss.

I only ask you to let them speak their minds. I doubt you
will find it an arduous task.

I apologize for troubling you. Please, return when
you have time. I fear I am at a loss.

You'd hear what we have to say? Then listen well, trusted
friend of Merukimon.

You see... we set out on a warrior's journey, traveling
together in search of strength.

Living in harsh environments and rescuing Digimon from Titan
attacks made us strong.
{next}You're friends, then?
{next}Why do you wanna get stronger?
{next}Looking at you two together hurts my eyes...

Once our paths crossed, our bold colors drew us together, as
did our shared goal.

Heh. An odd question. Our instincts drive us to get
stronger. We need no other reason!

Haha. Yes, we both glow gold, and we seek to burnish our
bodies as we polish our skills.

Yet struggling against the Titans has shown us that our
skills must be honed further.

Yes... It was when we thought to lend our aid in retaking
Central Town that we saw that.

I appreciate your willingness to help, but... neither of you
actually joined in that fight.

But we found Titans heading into the fray and chose to stop
them before they got there.

We found them no easy foes, however. We drove them off, but
were too injured to do more.

The fight to retake Central Town ended before we recovered.
We were powerless to help...

Which is why we'd like you to put us on the front for the
next large battle!

Yes, we have come to ask that you would count us in your
ranks for the next major clash.

You see? Such is the heat of their passion, I found myself
greatly moved by it.

However, as you are well aware, the battle before us is more
dangerous than any other.

I have only just met these two, and do not know their
strength. What am I to do?
{next}Why not have them fight in the Paradise Colosseum?
{next}}Why not just let them join the next battle?
{next}How about a game of Rock, Paper, Scissors?

...Ah! I never would have thought of that! I was right to
seek your opinion.

If they prove lacking in skill, they will be a hindrance,
and we may fail to protect them.

Will that truly let you assess their skill? I suppose they
do say one makes one's own luck.

Hmm. Having them fight in the Paradise Colosseum is likely
the best way to test them.

The arena, you say? That sounds like a fitting place for us to
demonstrate our skills.
Hmm... I wonder if they're capable of taking on Merukimon?

As we are prepared to fight at any time, you need but
challenge us when you are ready.
I am sorry, but I am too busy at the moment.

I must leave this task to you. Won't you test their skills
in battle for me?

Oh, you're willing to join the battle? Let's see how you
compare to Merukimon!

You need not hold back. Fight us with all you have, and
witness the extent of our might!

I know I am asking much of you, but we may just gain some
worthy allies in the process.

Test them in the Paradise Colosseum, and they shall join us
if you deem them worthy.

That was a fierce fight, indeed! As I'd expect from
Merukimon's trusted friend.

Now, then, as a mighty warrior yourself, how would you deem
our abilities?
{next}I'd say they were sufficient.
{next}Not so great, really.
{next}Neither impressive nor unimpressive.

You mean... you deem us worthy?! Then we'll join the next
battle without fail!

Bah. You're simply too strong. We'll join the next battle
and prove our worth on the field!

Enough with the noncommittal responses! This isn't one of
those human surveys, you know!

We fought a warrior as mighty as you and yet we stand. That
itself is proof of our mettle!

We'll join the coming battle regardless of what you might
say. Consider it settled.

From this point on, we are in your debt. You will convince
Merukimon to let us fight, yes?

Should you ever find yourself in trouble, we shall come to
your aid. You can count on it.

The two of us will continue to train until the time comes,
so we won't slow anyone down.

...You're caught up in a great struggle against fate, aren't
you? We wish you well.

What a nuisance. It seems they intended to join us no matter
what your decision was.

But now we know what they are capable of, and I can rely on
them without fear.

Take this as a token of my appreciation for testing their
strength. You have my thanks.
How are you holding up? Got a moment?
{next}I'm free now.
{end}I'm still busy.

I see. I am very pleased to hear it. Now, then, please hear
these two out.

Oh. You are still otherwise engaged? In that case,
speak with me again when you have time.
